title: Manage sports turf renovation programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage sports turf renovation programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess the turf renovation site

pcs.text: Inspect and assess turf surface condition for renovation site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and assess turf surface condition for renovation site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and assess turf surface condition for renovation site.

pcs.text: Assess soil physical and chemical test results to determine soil condition and determine corrective action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess soil physical and chemical test results to determine soil condition and determine corrective action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess soil physical and chemical test results to determine soil condition and determine corrective action.

pcs.text: Assess water quality test results to determine effect on turf growth and development according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess water quality test results to determine effect on turf growth and development according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess water quality test results to determine effect on turf growth and development according to industry standards.

pcs.text: Assess sward cover and identify over-sowing requirements and turf grass species/varieties required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess sward cover and identify over-sowing requirements and turf grass species/varieties required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess sward cover and identify over-sowing requirements and turf grass species/varieties required.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and specify controls for incorporation into plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and specify controls for incorporation into plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and specify controls for incorporation into plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess the turf renovation site

elements.title: Select renovation technique for sports turf site

pcs.text: Investigate and evaluate renovation techniques and practices using historical and current data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and evaluate renovation techniques and practices using historical and current data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and evaluate renovation techniques and practices using historical and current data.

pcs.text: Review renovation records to inform planned works, practices and timing

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review renovation records to inform planned works, practices and timing.

pcs.text: Determine turf renovation technique for current condition of turf and intended outcome of program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine turf renovation technique for current condition of turf and intended outcome of program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine turf renovation technique for current condition of turf and intended outcome of program.

pcs.text: Establish timing of renovation program according to turf species cultural requirements, renovation technique, weather conditions and sport turf usage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish timing of renovation program according to turf species cultural requirements, renovation technique, weather conditions and sport turf usage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish timing of renovation program according to turf species cultural requirements, renovation technique, weather conditions and sport turf usage.

pcs.text: Produce a financial budget for turf renovation activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce a financial budget for turf renovation activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce a financial budget for turf renovation activity.

pcs.text: Prepare a turf maintenance program for post-renovation recovery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a turf maintenance program for post-renovation recovery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a turf maintenance program for post-renovation recovery.

pcs.text: Document turf renovation program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document turf renovation program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document turf renovation program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select renovation technique for sports turf site

pcs.text: Determine machinery and equipment for renovation program, and check for working condition and settings and adjustments for sports turf renovation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine machinery and equipment for renovation program, and check for working condition and settings and adjustments for sports turf renovation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and sequence work requirements for the renovation program, and schedule work team and contractors.
